title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the photographs and answer the questions.

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say how the people might be feeling and what they might have done to prepare for these competitions.

images.label: A
images.description: Two professional chess players sitting in silence, staring intensely at the board in a tournament.

images.label: B
images.description: Young children at a school sports day, running a race with parents cheering in the background.

images.label: C
images.description: A group of e-sports players with headsets on, competing in a dark arena with neon lights.

followUp.question: Which of these competitions do you think is the most stressful? (Why?)

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say how effective these actions might be and how they might benefit the local community.

images.label: D
images.description: A large group of volunteers picking up plastic waste and trash from a beach.

images.label: E
images.description: A person installing solar panels on the roof of a residential house.

images.label: F
images.description: A group of city residents planting trees and flowers in a small community garden.

followUp.question: Which action do you think has the most significant long-term impact? (Why?)
